title: Show my workspaces in the far left menu bar
excerpt: I think its cumbersome to click “Work Management” to get to a dropdown of my workspaces.  Id like to be able to pin 5-7 workspaces on the far left menu bar so they are always accessible instead of having to click an extr…

posts.author: irfan (Irfan Khan)
posts.cookedHtml: I think its cumbersome to click “Work Management” to get to a dropdown of my workspaces. Id like to be able to pin 5-7 workspaces on the far left menu bar so they are always accessible instead of having to click an extra time and then use a dropdown.
